displayName: LoongSuite Pilot AI Coding 事件洞察
description: 只基于 AI Coding 事件事实表的使用、Token、模型、Skill、Tool 与集中度洞察。

attribute.remark: 按spec重新生成并发布事件报表

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
)
SELECT approx_distinct(user_id) AS "活跃用户数" FROM event_user_day

SELECT agent_type AS "AI Agent", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token" FROM event_user_day GROUP BY agent_type HAVING coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) > 0 ORDER BY "总Token" DESC LIMIT 20

basicOptions.displayName: 模型供应商 Token 占比

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
)
SELECT t, approx_distinct(user_id) AS "活跃用户数", coalesce(sum(events), 0) AS "事件数" FROM event_user_day GROUP BY t ORDER BY t LIMIT 10000

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_hour AS (
  SELECT
    date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%H:00') AS h,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY h, user_id
)
SELECT h AS "小时", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token" FROM event_user_hour GROUP BY h ORDER BY h
chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
* | WITH event_user_hour AS (
  SELECT
    date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%H:00') AS h,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY h, user_id
)
SELECT h AS "小时", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token" FROM event_user_hour GROUP BY h ORDER BY h

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
)
SELECT user_id AS "用户ID", coalesce(sum(input_tokens), 0) AS "输入Token", coalesce(sum(output_tokens), 0) AS "输出Token", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token", coalesce(sum(events), 0) AS "事件数", round(coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) / nullif(sum(events), 0), 2) AS "单事件平均Token", array_join(array_sort(array_agg(DISTINCT agent_type)), ', ') AS "AI Agent", array_join(array_sort(array_agg(DISTINCT model)), ', ') AS "模型" FROM event_user_day GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY "总Token" DESC LIMIT 500

    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
)
SELECT user_id AS "用户ID", coalesce(sum(input_tokens), 0) AS "输入Token", coalesce(sum(output_tokens), 0) AS "输出Token", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token", coalesce(sum(events), 0) AS "事件数", round(coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) / nullif(sum(events), 0), 2) AS "单事件平均Token", array_join(array_sort(array_agg(DISTINCT agent_type)), ', ') AS "AI Agent", array_join(array_sort(array_agg(DISTINCT model)), ', ') AS "模型" FROM event_user_day GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY "总Token" DESC LIMIT 500

chartQueries.query:
* | SELECT skill_name AS "Skill", count(1) AS "调用次数" FROM (
  SELECT CASE
  WHEN regexp_like(regexp_extract("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1), '^v?[0-9]+\.[0-9]+')
  THEN regexp_extract("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/v?[0-9][^/]*/[^/]+$', 1)
  WHEN lower(regexp_extract("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1)) IN ('skills', 'skill', '.claude', 'agents', 'resources', '.qoderwork', 'docs')
  THEN regexp_replace(regexp_extract("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)$', 1), '(?i)(\.skill)?\.md$', '')
  ELSE regexp_extract("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1)
END AS skill_name
  FROM log
  WHERE regexp_like("gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '(?i)(/SKILL\.md|/[^/]+\.skill\.md)$')
) WHERE skill_name IS NOT NULL AND skill_name <> '' AND upper(skill_name) <> 'SKILL' GROUP BY skill_name ORDER BY "调用次数" DESC LIMIT 10

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
user_token AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM event_user_day
  GROUP BY user_id
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER () AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER () AS all_tokens
  FROM user_token
)
SELECT round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比" FROM ranked

documentLinks.title: 按当前部门过滤后的在册员工总 Token 排序，取人数 Top20% 员工贡献的 Token 占比。

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
user_token AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM event_user_day
  GROUP BY user_id
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER () AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER () AS all_tokens
  FROM user_token
),
layered AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN 'Top 10%'
      WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN '10%-20%'
      ELSE '后80%'
    END AS user_layer,
    CASE
      WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN 1
      WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN 2
      ELSE 3
    END AS layer_rank,
    total_tokens,
    all_tokens
  FROM ranked
)
SELECT user_layer AS "人群分层", count(1) AS "人数", coalesce(sum(total_tokens), 0) AS "Token", round(sum(total_tokens) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Token占比(%)" FROM layered GROUP BY user_layer, layer_rank ORDER BY layer_rank

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH event_user_day AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
daily_user AS (
  SELECT t, user_id, sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM event_user_day
  GROUP BY t, user_id
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    t,
    user_id,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS all_tokens
  FROM daily_user
)
SELECT t, round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比", round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top20% Token占比" FROM ranked GROUP BY t ORDER BY t LIMIT 10000

    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
daily_user AS (
  SELECT t, user_id, sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM event_user_day
  GROUP BY t, user_id
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    t,
    user_id,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS all_tokens
  FROM daily_user
)
SELECT t, round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比", round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top20% Token占比" FROM ranked GROUP BY t ORDER BY t LIMIT 10000
